/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sfml/3.0.2/lib -lsfml-graphics -lsfml-window -lsfml-system "CMakeFiles/DualPetsDockPet.dir/Users/Lithos/Documents/GitHub/Ark-DeskPet/run_dual_pets.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/DualPetsDockPet.dir/Users/Lithos/Documents/GitHub/Ark-DeskPet/mac-dockpet/MacWindowUtils.mm.o" -o DualPetsDockPet.app/Contents/MacOS/DualPetsDockPet  -lsfml-graphics -lsfml-window -lsfml-system -framework Cocoa -framework OpenGL spine-cpp-build/libspine-cpp.a
